Use Trade cards to build an early resource advantage.
Summon cards stay on the battlefield and provide persistent damage.
Manage your Action Points (AP) carefully to combo multiple cards.
Hover over any card to review its specific abilities and stats.
Pay attention to the timer. If it reaches zero, your turn ends automatically!
Save your high-cost cards for when you have enough AP to swing the game.
A balanced deck of Trade and Summon cards is key to victory.
